resources.title: Rawkode Academy mono repository
resources.evidence_quote: Feel free to go to the Rawkode Academy mono repository, click on commits, and you'll see Claude is all through that repository over the last week.

resources.title: Comtrya dotfile management tool
resources.evidence_quote: I about five or six years ago, wrote Comtria, which is like a dot fail management tool written in Rust, and I hated it.
